name: robot
description: skillos_robot exposed as an llm_os cartridge. High-level navigation, perception, and motor control. The 20Hz reactive loop, reflex guard, and ESP32 firmware stay onboard; this cartridge is the strategic-layer surface that an upstream OS (skillos_mini, llm_os) calls into.

navigate.summary: Move the robot to a goal expressed in natural language or coordinates.

observe.summary: Return current SceneGraph snapshot (objects, positions, distances).

describe.summary: Return a natural-language description of the current view.

stop.summary: Emergency stop. Robot halts within reflex-guard latency (<50ms).

set_speed.summary: Cap motor speed (e.g., for tight environments).
